name: mojo-adr009-file-split
description: Split Mojo test files exceeding ADR-009 limit (≤10 fn test_ per file) to fix heap corruption CI failures. Use when: (1) CI shows intermittent libKGENCompilerRTShared.so heap corruption crashes, (2) a test file has more than 10 fn test_ functions, (3) ADR-009 compliance check fails.
